client_card.body: As you explore AI infrastructure, your existing private equity holdings could potentially complement this new interest, given the innovative nature of both spaces. I'd love to discuss how your values of innovation and legacy might be reflected in your portfolio's evolution, and explore ways to align your investments with your goals.
